title: The Lost Suitcase
content: After landing in Madrid, Olivia waited beside the baggage carousel for her suitcase. One by one, passengers collected their bags and left the area. Soon, the carousel stopped moving, but Olivia’s suitcase never appeared. She felt worried because all her clothes and personal items were inside. An airport employee helped her complete a report and explained the next steps. Fortunately, the airline found the suitcase later that evening. It had been sent to the wrong airport by mistake. The next morning, the bag arrived at Olivia’s hotel, and her vacation continued normally.
